folio.label: 119v
folio.l: Whicú that she hatú , I wys I were to nyce
And cause why , it shulde reported be
And tolde to hire , of some of this meyne
Of whom it nedetú nat , for to declare
Syn wo~men connen oute , sucú chaffare
And eke my wyt , suffisetú nat ther to
To tellen al , wherfore my tale is do
Squyere come ner , if it ©oure wylle be
And seye som what of loue , for certes ©e
Konen ther oon , as meche as any man
Nay sire q¶ he , but swicú thyng as I can
Witú hertly wylle , for I wil nougút rebelle
A geyn ©oure lust , a tale wol I ©ow telle
Haue me excused , if I speke amys
My wyl is good , and lo my tale is this
